entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan L. Millsp., the primary crop under evaluation

entities.name: MANDURA DISTRICT
entities.description: The specific district in Ethiopia where the experiment was conducted

entities.name: NORTH-WEST ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The regional location of the study

entities.name: IRRIGATION CONDITION
entities.description: The water management condition under which the crop was grown

entities.name: OFFSEASON
entities.description: The specific cropping season during which the experiment took place

entities.name: LARGE-PLOT BASED PERFORMANCE EVALUATION
entities.description: The method used to test and evaluate the adaptability and performance of varieties

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of usable grain produced per hectare

entities.name: STAND COUNT AT INITIAL
entities.description: The number of plants per unit area at the start of the experiment

entities.name: DAYS TO FLOWERING
entities.description: The time taken from planting to the onset of flowering

entities.name: DAYS TO MATURITY
entities.description: The time taken from planting to physiological maturity

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the plant

entities.name: STAND COUNT AT HARVEST
entities.description: The number of plants per unit area at the time of harvest

entities.name: SEEDS PER POD
entities.description: The average number of seeds found in each pod

entities.name: SEEDS PER PLANT
entities.description: The total number of seeds produced by a single plant

entities.name: WILT SCORE
entities.description: A measure of the plant's susceptibility or resistance to wilt disease

entities.name: HUNDRED SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of one hundred seeds, used as an indicator of seed size

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of biological material produced by the varieties

entities.name: ICEAP-00557
entities.description: An introduced ESA pigeonpea variety that showed the highest grain yield

entities.name: ICEAP-00576-1
entities.description: An introduced ESA pigeonpea variety with high grain yield

entities.name: ICEAP-87091
entities.description: A standard check pigeonpea variety with inferior grain yield

entities.name: ADAPTABILITY
entities.description: The ability of the varieties to adjust to the environment of Mandura District

entities.name: PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The overall success of the varieties in terms of yield and traits

entities.name: MATURITY CLASS
entities.description: The classification of varieties based on their growth duration

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMIC PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The economic benefit and social impact of promoting high-yielding varieties
